arts.ttl: Sky Sports: Tottenham Among Frontrunners to Sign ‘Outstanding’ Forward
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are seen as the biggest competitors for RB Leipzig in the race to sign Southampton starlet Tyler Dibling.

arts.ttl: 'I would say': Gary Neville thinks Ange Postecoglou is actually taking a 'massive risk' at Tottenham
Hoffenheim vs Tottenham simulated to predict huge Europa League clash
arts.sum: After tasting defeat again on the weekend, Spurs will be looking to bounce back and pick up a vital three points against Hoffenheim in the Europa League. Antonin Kinsky cannot be registered until the knockout stages meaning Brandon Austin could start in goal, while Djed Spence and Sergio Reguilon are also unavailable, with the duo not part of Spurs' Europa League squad.

arts.ttl: Cesc Fabregas clashed with ex-Tottenham star who called Dele Alli decision 'pathetic'
arts.sum: Dele Alli inked an 18-month deal with Serie A club Como that will see him play under Cesc Fabregas, with the ex-Spurs star hoping to get his once-promising career back on track

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Hoffenheim – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to Hoffenheim on Thursday evening aiming to break into the Europa League’s top eight. Outside the automatic qualification places on goal difference, a win in Germany will take the North Londoners into the top eight ahead of the final league phase fixtures. arts.ttl: Hoffenheim vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: A depleted Tottenham face German opposition in the Europa League tonight as they take on Hoffenheim in Sinsheim. Both sides are experiencing difficult campaigns and both occupy 15th position in their respective leagues. Pape Matar Sarr has joined Spurs’ extensive injury list after suffering a knock against Everton. arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: Cunha has given his all and his impact is undeniable. Without him, you wonder where Wolves would be this season. But, this isn't what Cunha believed he was signing up to.
